findings_summary: Dashboard/API reassign-route guard smoke passed: vFinal parent cards and worker subtasks cannot be manually reassigned, while ordinary disposable task reassign still works.
tool_or_profile: Hermes v0.16.0 disposable installed runtime with vFinal adapter patches including candidate 0012
runtime_scope: Disposable installed Hermes checkout and isolated HERMES_HOME/HOME; direct Python calls into dashboard plugin route functions; no production dashboard server.

parent.detail: Overkill Factory cards and worker subtasks cannot be reassigned from dashboard/API; worker identity is part of the Factory method contract. Use an explicit operator-safe recovery w

worker.detail: Overkill Factory cards and worker subtasks cannot be reassigned from dashboard/API; worker identity is part of the Factory method contract. Use an explicit operator-safe recovery w

important_limitations: This proves direct dashboard plugin route functions in a disposable installed Hermes runtime after candidate patch 0012.
It does not start an authenticated HTTP dashboard server.
It does not define a future operator-approved reassign workflow.
It does not authorize updating a real Hermes runtime.
next_action: Add patch 0012 to the update sequence and continue proving remaining dashboard/API route families.
